task_completion.description: Open ProjectLibre with the correct project loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre application window is visible, and the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' is loaded (visible in the title bar or project summary).
The 'Resources' spreadsheet view is active, displaying a list of project resources, or a 'Resource Information' dialog is open.

task_completion.description: Set Cost Accrual for David Brown to Start
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Resources spreadsheet, the 'Accrue At' column for 'David Brown' is set to 'Start', or the Resource Information dialog for David Brown shows 'Start' selected for the accrual method.

task_completion.description: Set Cost Accrual for Emma Davis to End
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Resources spreadsheet, the 'Accrue At' column for 'Emma Davis' is set to 'End', or the Resource Information dialog for Emma Davis shows 'End' selected for the accrual method.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an XML file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog is visible with the file name 'resource_costs.xml', the directory set to '/home/ga/Projects/', and the file type set to Microsoft Project XML, or terminal output verifying the existence of the newly saved XML file at that path.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to modify resource settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre interface (spreadsheet or dialogs) to change the 'Accrue At' settings, rather than editing a file in a text editor or using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to save the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ProjectLibre 'Save As' dialog being used to export the XML file, rather than a script or terminal command generating the file.

integrity.description: Other resources were left as Prorated
integrity.visual_evidence: In the Resources spreadsheet, the 'Accrue At' column for resources other than David Brown and Emma Davis remains set to 'Prorated'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is '/home/ga/Projects/resource_costs.xml'. In the Microsoft Project XML (MSPDI) schema, the <AccrueAt> element under <Resource> uses '1' for Start, '2' for End, and '3' for Prorated (the default).
